response.overview: Caution: Active Ingredients; Estrogen 2%, Pure Fun 98%.... Anita has turned her attention to the life between our ears and all the things that drive us crazy. She unleashes her spontaneous and distinctive brand of musical comedy as she ponders some of life's deeper issues: Why does lipstick stay on a coffee cup through three wash cycles but not on your lips? Why are there no fat pictures of Elvis in Graceland? What did Walt Disney have against moms? Positive and encouraging, Anita Renfroe is also certifiably funny. Strap your thinking cap to your funny bone and take a walk on the wacky side.
response.title: ANITA RENFROE THINKING OUT LOUD
